able: 1. She is able to ride a bike now. 🚲 2. Are you able to swim? 🏊
about: 1. This book is about a little dog. 🐶 2. Tell me about your day. 💬
absolutely: 1. You are absolutely right! ✅ 2. I absolutely love ice cream. 🍦
access: 1. We have access to the library. 📚 2. Can I access the computer? 💻
activity: 1. My favorite activity is drawing. 🎨 2. We do fun activities at school. 🏫
actually: 1. Actually, I like cats more than dogs. 🐱 2. It's actually very easy. ✨
affect: 1. Rain can affect our picnic plans. 🌧️ 2. Sleep affects how you feel. 😴
against: 1. Don't lean against the wall. 🧱 2. Our team played against theirs. ⚽
all: 1. All the kids are playing outside. 🌳 2. I ate all my lunch. 🍱
allow: 1. Mom allows me to play after homework. 📝 2. Dogs are not allowed in the shop. 🐕
although: 1. Although it rained, we still had fun. ☔ 2. Although I was tired, I finished my work. 💪
amount: 1. I have a small amount of candy. 🍬 2. What amount of water do you need? 💧
and: 1. I like cats and dogs. 🐾 2. Mom and Dad are cooking dinner. 🍳
annual: 1. Our school has an annual sports day. 🏅 2. The annual fair is so much fun! 🎪
appear: 1. Stars appear in the sky at night. ⭐ 2. A rainbow appeared after the rain. 🌈
apple: 1. I eat an apple every day. 🍎 2. This apple is sweet and red. 🍏
approach: 1. We approach the school gate every morning. 🏫 2. A cat approached me slowly. 🐱
area: 1. This area is good for playing. 🏞️ 2. We live in a quiet area. 🏡
army: 1. The toy army marches on the table. 🪖 2. My uncle works in the army. 💂
artist: 1. She wants to be an artist one day. 🎨 2. The artist painted a beautiful flower. 🌸
audience: 1. The audience clapped their hands. 👏 2. There was a big audience at the show. 🎭
available: 1. Is this seat available? 💺 2. The teacher is available after class. 👩‍🏫
be: 1. I want to be a doctor. 🩺 2. Please be quiet in the library. 🤫
believe: 1. I believe you can do it! 💪 2. Do you believe in magic? ✨
benefit: 1. Reading has many benefits for kids. 📖 2. Exercise benefits your body. 🏃
book: 1. I read a book before bed. 📖 2. This is my favorite book. 📚
booking: 1. We made a booking for dinner. 🍽️ 2. The hotel booking is for two nights. 🏨
boy: 1. The boy is playing with his dog. 🐕 2. That boy is my best friend. 👦
business: 1. My dad runs a small business. 🏪 2. She is good at business. 💼
by train: 1. We go to grandma's house by train. 🚂 2. Traveling by train is fun! 🚃
camp: 1. We camp near the river in summer. ⛺ 2. The kids love going to camp. 🏕️
camper: 1. Each camper has a sleeping bag. 🛏️ 2. The happy camper made new friends. 😊
campsite: 1. Our campsite is under the big tree. 🌲 2. We set up tents at the campsite. ⛺
candidate: 1. She is a candidate for class leader. 🗳️ 2. There are three candidates to choose from. ✋
career: 1. What career do you want when you grow up? 🌟 2. Teaching is a great career. 👩‍🏫
case: 1. In that case, let's go home. 🏠 2. Put your pencils in the case. ✏️
cat: 1. My cat likes to sleep on the sofa. 🐱 2. The cat is playing with a ball. 🧶
central: 1. The park is in the central part of town. 🏙️ 2. There is a central library near us. 📚
charge: 1. I need to charge my phone. 🔋 2. Who is in charge of the class today? 👩‍🏫
commemorative: 1. We got a commemorative stamp for the event. 📮 2. This is a commemorative photo of our trip. 📸
comment: 1. The teacher wrote a nice comment on my work. ✍️ 2. Do you have any comments? 💬
company: 1. I enjoy your company very much. 😊 2. My mom works at a big company. 🏢
complete: 1. I will complete my homework soon. ✅ 2. The puzzle is now complete! 🧩
completely: 1. The glass is completely empty. 🥛 2. I completely forgot about the test! 😱
consider: 1. Please consider my idea. 💡 2. We should consider taking an umbrella. ☂️
control: 1. You can control the toy car with this. 🎮 2. She can control her feelings well. 😌
couple: 1. I need a couple of minutes. ⏰ 2. A couple of birds sat on the tree. 🐦
courage: 1. It takes courage to try new things. 💪 2. She showed great courage on stage. 🎤
court: 1. We play basketball on the court. 🏀 2. The court is next to the school. 🏫
create: 1. Let's create a picture together. 🎨 2. The children create stories every day. 📚
crew: 1. The ship has a friendly crew. ⛵ 2. Our cleaning crew did a great job. 🧹
data: 1. We collect data for our science project. 🔬 2. The computer stores a lot of data. 💾
death: 1. The death of the old tree made us sad. 🌳 2. We read a story about life and death. 📖
decide: 1. I can't decide which color I like. 🎨 2. Let's decide together what game to play. 🎲
decision: 1. That was a good decision! 👍 2. Making a decision can be hard. 🤔
department: 1. The toy department is on the second floor. 🧸 2. My dad works in the fire department. 🚒
despite: 1. Despite the rain, we went to the park. 🌧️ 2. She smiled despite being tired. 😊
development: 1. The development of the baby is amazing. 👶 2. This town has a lot of new development. 🏗️
disease: 1. Washing hands helps stop disease. 🧼 2. The vet can help animals with disease. 🏥
dish: 1. Please put the dish on the table. 🍽️ 2. This dish tastes really good! 😋
district: 1. We live in a nice district. 🏘️ 2. The school district has ten schools. 🏫
during: 1. Be quiet during the movie. 🎬 2. We play outside during break time. ⏸️
education: 1. Education is important for everyone. 📚 2. She got a good education at school. 🎓
effect: 1. Music has a good effect on my mood. 🎵 2. The medicine had a quick effect. 💊
election: 1. We had an election for class leader. 🗳️ 2. The school election is next week. 📅
employee: 1. The shop has five employees. 🏪 2. Every employee gets a name tag. 🏷️
enclosed: 1. I enclosed a picture in the letter. 💌 2. The garden is enclosed by a fence. 🌿
energy: 1. Kids have so much energy! ⚡ 2. Eating breakfast gives you energy. 🍞
environment: 1. We should protect our environment. 🌍 2. Trees are good for the environment. 🌳
equipment: 1. We need sports equipment for PE class. ⚽ 2. The camping equipment is in the car. 🚗
even: 1. Even my little sister can do it. 👧 2. The table is nice and even. ✨
ever: 1. Have you ever seen a rainbow? 🌈 2. This is the best cake I ever ate. 🎂
expect: 1. I expect it will rain today. 🌧️ 2. We expect guests for dinner tonight. 🍽️
experience: 1. Camping was a great experience. ⛺ 2. I had a fun experience at the zoo. 🦁
explain: 1. Can you explain this word to me? 📝 2. The teacher explained the game rules. 📋
fact: 1. It's a fact that dogs need water. 🐕 2. In fact, I love this song! 🎵
failure: 1. Failure helps us learn and grow. 🌱 2. Don't be afraid of failure. 💪
far: 1. The school is not far from my home. 🏫 2. How far is the park? 🌳
fee: 1. The swimming pool has a small fee. 🏊 2. There is no fee for the library. 📚
few: 1. I have a few friends at school. 👫 2. There are only a few apples left. 🍎
financial: 1. My parents make financial plans every month. 💰 2. Financial means about money. 🏦
foot: 1. I hurt my foot while running. 🦶 2. The cat sat at my foot. 🐱
for instance: 1. I like fruits, for instance, apples and bananas. 🍌 2. Some animals can fly, for instance, birds. 🐦
form: 1. Please fill in this form. 📋 2. Water can take many forms, like ice. ❄️
former: 1. My former teacher was very kind. 👩‍🏫 2. The former owner of this house moved away. 🏠
from dawn to dark: 1. We played from dawn to dark on Saturday. ☀️ 2. The farmer works from dawn to dark. 🌾
gas: 1. We need gas for the car. ⛽ 2. Gas rises up like a balloon. 🎈
general: 1. In general, cats like to sleep a lot. 🐱 2. The general idea is easy to understand. 💡
get: 1. Can I get a glass of water? 💧 2. I get up early every morning. ⏰
go: 1. Let's go to the park! 🌳 2. I go to school by bus. 🚌
government: 1. The government builds roads for us. 🛣️ 2. The government helps keep us safe. 🏛️
guy: 1. That guy is really tall. 👨 2. He is a nice guy. 😊
hang: 1. Please hang your coat on the hook. 🧥 2. We hang pictures on the wall. 🖼️
health: 1. Good food is important for your health. 🥗 2. I hope you are in good health. 💚
hey: 1. Hey, come and play with us! 🎉 2. Hey, look at that big bird! 🦅
hobby: 1. My hobby is reading books. 📚 2. Drawing is a fun hobby. 🎨
however: 1. I love ice cream. However, it's too cold today. ❄️ 2. She tried hard. However, she didn't win. 💪
huge: 1. We saw a huge elephant at the zoo. 🐘 2. That's a huge birthday cake! 🎂
human: 1. Every human needs food and water. 🧑 2. Humans and animals share the Earth. 🌍
identify: 1. Can you identify this bird? 🐦 2. I can identify all the colors. 🌈
in danger: 1. The little bird is in danger from the cat. 🐦 2. Animals in danger need our help. 🆘
in fact: 1. In fact, today is my birthday! 🎂 2. In fact, I finished my homework early. ✅
include: 1. Please include me in the game. 🎮 2. The box includes a free toy. 🎁
included: 1. Lunch is included in the trip price. 🍱 2. All students are included in the photo. 📸
including: 1. I like many fruits, including grapes. 🍇 2. Everyone came, including my best friend. 👯
individual: 1. Each individual person is special. 🌟 2. We each get an individual cup. 🥤
industry: 1. The car industry makes many cars every year. 🚗 2. The food industry gives us yummy snacks. 🍪
information: 1. I found the information in a book. 📖 2. Can you give me more information? ℹ️
ink: 1. My pen ran out of ink. 🖊️ 2. Be careful, the ink is still wet! 💧
integrity: 1. Integrity means being honest. 💎 2. A person with integrity keeps their promises. 🤝
interest: 1. I have a big interest in animals. 🐾 2. This story caught my interest. 📖
interested: 1. I am interested in science. 🔬 2. Are you interested in cooking? 🍳
internet: 1. I use the internet to learn new things. 💻 2. The internet helps us talk to friends far away. 🌐
involve: 1. This game involves running and jumping. 🏃 2. The project involves drawing a map. 🗺️
issue: 1. The new issue of the comic is out! 📖 2. We have a small issue with the printer. 🖨️
job: 1. Her job is to teach children. 👩‍🏫 2. You did a great job on the test! 🌟
joy: 1. The puppy brings us so much joy. 🐶 2. I felt joy when I saw my friends. 😊
just: 1. I just finished my homework. ✅ 2. It's just a small cat. 🐱
kill: 1. The cold weather can kill plants. 🥶 2. Don't kill the little bugs. 🐛
know: 1. I know how to ride a bike. 🚲 2. Do you know the answer? 🤔
large: 1. We need a large box for the toys. 📦 2. The dog has large brown eyes. 🐶
last: 1. This is the last piece of cake. 🍰 2. The movie will last two hours. ⏰
law: 1. There is a law to keep us safe. 🔒 2. Everyone must follow the law. ⚖️
lay: 1. Please lay the book on the desk. 📚 2. The hen will lay an egg. 🥚
leaflet: 1. I picked up a leaflet about the zoo. 🦁 2. The leaflet shows a map of the park. 🗺️
level: 1. I reached the next level in the game! 🎮 2. The water level is very high today. 💧
lose: 1. Don't lose your keys! 🔑 2. I don't want to lose the game. 😤
make: 1. Let's make a sandcastle on the beach. 🏖️ 2. Mom will make dinner tonight. 🍲
market: 1. We buy fresh fruit at the market. 🍊 2. The market is busy on weekends. 🛒
may: 1. You may go out and play now. ☀️ 2. It may rain later today. 🌦️
mean: 1. What does this word mean? 💡 2. Don't be mean to your friends. 🌟
member: 1. I am a member of the art club. 🎨 2. Every member got a prize. 🏆
might: 1. It might snow tomorrow. ❄️ 2. She might come to the party. 🎉
million: 1. There are millions of stars in the sky. ⭐ 2. A million is a very big number! 🔢
model: 1. He built a model airplane. ✈️ 2. She is a model student. 🌟
network: 1. The internet is a big network. 🌐 2. A network of roads connects the cities. 🛣️
next: 1. The next stop is the zoo. 🦁 2. I sit next to my best friend. 👫
of: 1. I have a cup of milk. 🥛 2. The color of the sky is blue. 💙
offer: 1. She offered me a cookie. 🍪 2. I offer to help clean the room. 🧹
oh: 1. Oh, what a cute puppy! 🐶 2. Oh no, I forgot my bag! 😱
once: 1. I go to the dentist once a year. 🦷 2. Once you try it, you will love it. ❤️
online: 1. I take an online class on Saturdays. 💻 2. You can buy toys online. 🧸
option: 1. We have two options for lunch. 🍽️ 2. Which option do you like better? 🤔
pain: 1. I feel a small pain in my leg. 🦵 2. The pain went away after rest. 😌
paintbrush: 1. I need a paintbrush to color this. 🖌️ 2. Clean the paintbrush after painting. 🎨
particularly: 1. I particularly like the blue one. 💙 2. Today is particularly hot. ☀️
party: 1. We had a party for my birthday. 🎂 2. The party was so much fun! 🎉
per: 1. We have one apple per person. 🍎 2. The bus comes once per hour. 🚌
percent: 1. I got 100 percent on my test! 💯 2. Fifty percent means half. ➗
police: 1. The police help keep us safe. 👮 2. A police car drove by our school. 🚔
political: 1. A political leader runs the country. 🏛️ 2. We learned about political maps in class. 🗺️
power: 1. The sun gives us light and power. ☀️ 2. This toy needs battery power. 🔋
president: 1. The president leads the country. 🏛️ 2. She is the president of our club. 👩
press: 1. Press the button to start the game. 🎮 2. Press the flower inside the book. 🌼
professor: 1. The professor teaches at the university. 🎓 2. A professor knows a lot about science. 🔬
program: 1. I like this TV program. 📺 2. We wrote a computer program in class. 💻
project: 1. Our class project is about animals. 🐾 2. The art project was fun to make. 🎨
property: 1. This bag is my property. 🎒 2. Don't take other people's property. ⚠️
protect: 1. We should protect the trees. 🌳 2. A helmet protects your head. ⛑️
prove: 1. Can you prove that you are right? 🤔 2. The test will prove how much you learned. 📝
provide: 1. The school provides free lunch. 🍱 2. Trees provide shade on sunny days. 🌳
race: 1. Let's have a race to the tree! 🏃 2. The turtle won the race in the story. 🐢
raise: 1. Raise your hand if you know the answer. ✋ 2. They raise chickens on the farm. 🐔
reality: 1. In reality, cats can't fly. 🐱 2. The dream felt so real, but reality is different. 💭
reason: 1. The reason I'm happy is my birthday. 🎂 2. There is a good reason to study hard. 📚
receive: 1. I will receive a gift on my birthday. 🎁 2. Did you receive my letter? 💌
record: 1. She set a new school record in running. 🏅 2. Let's record a video together. 📹
reduce: 1. We should reduce how much paper we use. ♻️ 2. Turn off the light to reduce energy use. 💡
regarded: 1. She is regarded as the best singer in class. 🎤 2. The park is regarded as very beautiful. 🌸
region: 1. This region has many mountains. ⛰️ 2. Different foods grow in each region. 🌾
relationship: 1. I have a good relationship with my friends. 👫 2. The relationship between a pet and its owner is special. 🐶
remain: 1. Please remain in your seat. 💺 2. Only two cookies remain in the box. 🍪
remove: 1. Please remove your shoes at the door. 👟 2. I need to remove this sticker. 🏷️
report: 1. I wrote a report about my trip. 📝 2. The weather report says it will be sunny. ☀️
require: 1. This game requires two players. 🎮 2. Plants require water and sunlight. 🌱
research: 1. We did research on dinosaurs. 🦕 2. The students research animals for homework. 📖
rise: 1. I watch the sun rise every morning. 🌅 2. The bread dough will rise slowly. 🍞
say: 1. What did the teacher say? 👩‍🏫 2. I want to say thank you. 🙏
season: 1. My favorite season is summer. ☀️ 2. Each season has different weather. 🍂
security: 1. The school has good security. 🔒 2. A security guard stands at the gate. 🧑‍✈️
seem: 1. You seem happy today! 😊 2. It seems like a nice day outside. ☀️
sense: 1. I have a good sense of smell. 👃 2. That doesn't make sense to me. 🤔
series: 1. I watched the whole series on TV. 📺 2. There is a series of books about magic. 📚
serve: 1. She serves food at the restaurant. 🍽️ 2. It's my turn to serve the ball. 🏐
service: 1. The bus service runs every ten minutes. 🚌 2. Thank you for your service. 🙏
several: 1. I have several books to read. 📚 2. Several birds are singing in the tree. 🐦
sex: 1. The vet checked the sex of the kitten. 🐱 2. Both sexes can play this game. ⚽
since: 1. I have lived here since I was born. 🏠 2. Since it's raining, let's stay inside. 🌧️
sort: 1. Let's sort the toys by color. 🧸 2. What sort of food do you like? 🍕
staff: 1. The school staff is very friendly. 🏫 2. All staff wear a blue shirt. 👕
stamp: 1. I put a stamp on the letter. 💌 2. My hobby is collecting stamps. 📮
such: 1. It's such a beautiful day! ☀️ 2. Don't eat such a lot of candy. 🍬
suggest: 1. I suggest we go to the park. 🌳 2. Can you suggest a good book? 📖
support: 1. My friends always support me. 💪 2. Parents support their children. ❤️
surf: 1. I want to learn to surf this summer. 🏄 2. I like to surf the internet after school. 💻
system: 1. The school has a reward system. ⭐ 2. The solar system has eight planets. 🪐
tax: 1. People pay tax to the government. 💰 2. The tax helps build new roads. 🛣️
team: 1. Our team won the game! 🏆 2. We work as a team in class. 🤝
term: 1. This term we learn about plants. 🌱 2. What does this term mean? 📝
thank: 1. Thank you for helping me. 🙏 2. I want to thank my teacher. 💐
the: 1. The sun is shining today. ☀️ 2. Look at the beautiful flowers! 🌺
think: 1. I think this game is fun. 🎮 2. What do you think about my drawing? 🖍️
though: 1. I like it, though it's a bit big. 👕 2. Though I'm tired, I'll keep going. 🏃
to: 1. Let's walk to the park. 🌳 2. Give this to your mom. 🎁
trip: 1. We went on a trip to the beach. 🏖️ 2. The school trip was amazing! 🚌
umbrella: 1. Take your umbrella, it might rain. ☂️ 2. My umbrella has pretty flowers on it. 🌂
union: 1. The students formed a union at school. 🤝 2. A union of teams played together. ⚽
university: 1. My sister studies at a university. 🎓 2. I want to go to university one day. 🏫
up: 1. Look up at the blue sky! 💙 2. Wake up, it's morning! ⏰
value: 1. This old toy has great value to me. 🧸 2. I value my friendship with you. 💛
various: 1. The shop has various kinds of candy. 🍬 2. We tried various games at the fair. 🎪
version: 1. I like the new version of this song. 🎵 2. This is a kid's version of the story. 📖
war: 1. We learned about a big war in history. 📜 2. War is bad for everyone. 🕊️
whether: 1. I don't know whether to go or stay. 🤷 2. Whether it rains or not, we'll have fun. ☀️
while: 1. Read a book while you wait. 📖 2. I fell asleep while watching TV. 📺
whole: 1. I ate the whole pizza by myself! 🍕 2. The whole class went on the trip. 🚌
within: 1. The park is within walking distance. 🚶 2. Please finish within ten minutes. ⏰
without: 1. I can't go outside without my shoes. 👟 2. She went to school without breakfast. 🍞
yeah: 1. Yeah, that sounds like a great idea! 👍 2. Yeah, I love that movie too! 🎬
discover: 1. Let's discover new animals at the zoo. 🦁 2. I want to discover a hidden treasure. 💎
important: 1. Sleep is important for kids. 😴 2. Today is an important day for me. 🎉
regard: 1. I regard her as my best friend. 👯 2. He didn't regard the little cat. 🐱
